nature_methods_requirement: Pure-null synthetic false signal PC rate is close to the chosen alpha.
evidence_expected: Synthetic benchmark summary plus permutation-calibrated null runs.
genome_biology_fallback_logic: If pending, keep methods manuscript in preparation; if fail, rework PC calibration before any submission.

nature_methods_requirement: Null-like matrices return diagnostic no-call while planted signal remains callable.
evidence_expected: No-call benchmark summary covering pure-null, planted low-rank, and rare-state scenarios.
genome_biology_fallback_logic: If fail, do not claim noise-controlled discovery until no-call behavior is fixed.

nature_methods_requirement: RMTGuard does not discard rare planted states in synthetic stress tests.
evidence_expected: Rare-state simulation ARI/NMI and rare-cell cluster preservation.
genome_biology_fallback_logic: If pass with weaker effect size, acceptable for Genome Biology with clearer limitations.

nature_methods_requirement: At least four public real datasets are benchmarked.
evidence_expected: PBMC, perturbation, pancreas/atlas, and PDAC/TME benchmark outputs.
genome_biology_fallback_logic: If at least three real datasets plus complete software, Genome Biology remains possible.

nature_methods_requirement: RMTGuard improves or remains within margin on callable datasets, and returns validated diagnostic no-call on low-confidence datasets rather than forcing clusters.
evidence_expected: Paired stability metrics against Scanpy, fixed PCs, no-call diagnostics, and annotation support.
pass_condition: status=pass required for Nature Methods, but wording must remain callability-aware.
genome_biology_fallback_logic: If only comparable without validated no-call, redirect to Genome Biology as reproducible workflow/software.

nature_methods_requirement: Annotation recovery is not materially worse than Scanpy/Seurat defaults.
genome_biology_fallback_logic: If fail, do not submit until the algorithm is revised.

nature_methods_requirement: PDAC/TME showcase has stable, marker-supported CAF, immune, or malignant ductal states.
evidence_expected: GSE154778 main analysis and GSE263733 validation with markers/pathways.
genome_biology_fallback_logic: If weak but reproducible, keep as Genome Biology public use case rather than headline biology.

nature_methods_requirement: GitHub, CI, Docker, Zenodo DOI, data scripts, test data, and figure source data are complete.
evidence_expected: Release audit, GitHub release, Zenodo DOI, and reproducibility commands.
pass_condition: status=pass required for both Nature Methods and Genome Biology.

nature_methods_requirement: All five main figures can be regenerated from public scripts and source data.
genome_biology_fallback_logic: If partial, Genome Biology submission can proceed only after core benchmark figures are reproducible.
